---
title: "huginn.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/wardens/huginn.py"
loc: 80
complexity: 13
logic_score: 1.37
style_score: 3.85
intel_score: 4.40
overall_score: 3.17
---

## Intent
Autonomous neural guardian monitoring system drift and anomalies.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate the Warden class and call evaluate(graph) with a compiled matrix graph.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 31 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.base](file://src.sentinel.wardens.base)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)

### Exports
- `HuginnWarden`
- `__init__`
- `scan`
- `_scan_regex`
- `_scan_neural_async`
